hero.title: AI debate platform for academic competition
hero.subtitle: Play ranked debates, create private rooms, and receive clear AI feedback after every match.

showcase.liveCopy: Structured rounds, fast pacing, and better focus on decision-making and rebuttal.

start.title: Join debates your way
start.description: Queue into ranked matches or open private rooms for your friends and debate club.
start.panelDetail: Jump into matchmaking or host your own debate table.

ai.title: AI helps you debate better
ai.description: AI does more than score. It highlights weak reasoning, fallacies, and what to improve after the match.
ai.panelDetail: Turn every debate into a measurable learning loop.

progress.title: Track real progress after every match
progress.description: ELO, win/loss history, and your profile show exactly where you are improving.
progress.panelDetail: See where you are strong and what you should train next.

community.title: See the debate community in motion
community.description: Watch live debates, explore the leaderboard, and learn faster by observing other players.
community.panelDetail: You can still observe, analyze, and learn even before joining a match.

finalCta.title: Ready for your next debate?
finalCta.copy: Start a ranked match, open a private room, or explore the community debating right now.
